refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to system stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels to increase link reliability.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and automatic failover mechanisms.
DP3: Provide link status reporting and alerting services.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant communication channels to increase link reliability.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Reporting interfaces coupled with monitoring data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FRs with manageable coupling; redundancy isolates failure modes and reduces cross-dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundant channels can be implemented within existing hardware constraints.
Risk that failover timing may not meet availability targets if monitoring is delayed.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 (monitoring and failover) in next decomposition level to address failover timing risk.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for teleoperation link management, including redundancy and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections supporting teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Reporting link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution and other stakeholders.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but teleoperation link logic is diffused if assigned here.
Vehicle module has limited direct control over teleoperation link redundancy.
Best containment of teleoperation link redundancy and monitoring logic.
Safety Services focus on alerts, not link management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes link redundancy and failover logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for status reporting.
Dependency on Network Link interface reliability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts for Teleoperation to NGHE Solution and Safety Services to mitigate interface complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant communication channels) directly addresses the refined FRs with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as Teleoperation module encapsulates link management.
Interface complexity manageable with defined protocols.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor Teleoperation module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and link availability measurements at the Teleoperation module boundary.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: In next level, refine monitoring and failover FRs and DPs to ensure timing constraints are met.
Clarify interface definitions between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, integrating monitoring and failover mechanisms explicitly will reduce risk and improve design completeness.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to system stakeholders.

revise.why: To explicitly include monitoring and failover mechanisms supporting redundancy for improved availability.

assumptions: Redundant communication channels can be implemented within existing hardware and network constraints.
Telemetry interface supports timely and accurate reporting.
open_risks: Failover timing may not meet availability targets without explicit monitoring and recovery DPs.
Interface complexity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution may increase.
evidence_needed: Performance data on failover timing and link recovery.
Interface specification documents for Teleoperation module.
